entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Do not add any stub implementations, this isnt to be just the scaffolding but the entire addition! Please just make it in phases and lets start now finishing! Time isnt of an essense nor is complexity so please dont stub any imlementation or leave any out due to it being complex!

Please fully begin compilation with full features including ALL masm and ALL C++ included, no duds, no stubs, if anything is broken please fully fix it systematically even if it takes us phases please and thank you! Please also audit to see how close we are to cursor / vs code with github co pilot and features(if any at this point) should be included!'
